title: Furnitura
description: This Mod adds lots of new decoration blocks and items.
body:
![Bisect hoasting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/887c8634-752f-403f-a6bd-2efbf7b86b8d.webp)This is an Exciting mod that adds a lot of new decoration blocks to Minecraft. 

This mod is all about adding furniture and decorations for every part of your house some examples are your living room, dining room, bedroom and the outdoors.

This mod contains chairs, toasters, microwaves, couches and more

From toasters to Couches this mod has it all. Furnitura has crafting recipes for survival players and a custom creative mode tab for creative. Each decoration block that is made of wood has most if not all types of wood variants! This mod will continue to add more and more blocks to Minecraft so you can decorate your personal home in Minecraft!
